tiktok/token.mjs.prompt: Manage TikTok OAuth access tokens — load from .env, refresh when expired
tiktok/token.mjs.expectedResult: exports getAccessToken() → resolves to valid Bearer token string used by all other tiktok scripts

tiktok/post-video.mjs.prompt: CLI tool to post a single TikTok video via FILE_UPLOAD or PULL_FROM_URL for @jsuprememarketing
tiktok/post-video.mjs.expectedResult: reads CLI args (--file/--url/--title/--privacy), calls TikTok v2 API, polls until PUBLISH_COMPLETE

tiktok/schedule-reels.mjs.prompt: Batch post multiple reels from a hardcoded queue with 60s gap between posts
tiktok/schedule-reels.mjs.expectedResult: iterates REELS array, uploads each file, waits between posts, supports --dry-run flag

tiktok/auth.mjs.prompt: TikTok OAuth authorization flow — get initial access + refresh tokens
tiktok/auth.mjs.expectedResult: starts local server, opens OAuth URL, receives callback, saves tokens to .env

campaigns/jst-jsm-ad-carousels.html.prompt: JST + JSM psychology-led ad carousel campaigns for @jsuprememarketing
campaigns/jst-jsm-ad-carousels.html.expectedResult: standalone HTML ad deck — swipeable carousel slides with brand identity, no external deps

campaigns/jst-jsm-content-hub.html.prompt: JST + JSM content hub with TikTok reel scripts and API integration guide
campaigns/jst-jsm-content-hub.html.expectedResult: standalone HTML reference page — content calendar, reel scripts, API setup walkthrough
